MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.x_poster_agent
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/x_poster_agent.py (128 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS X POSTER AGENT
Background agent that posts to X periodically with swarm updates, memes, and shills.

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_random_post() -> str
- async def post_to_x(text: str) -> bool
- async def x_poster_loop()
- async def main()
